guest_name: Stacey Sims, Natalie Crawford, Mary Claire Haver, Vonda Wright
expertise_area: Exercise Physiology, Fertility, OBGYN, Orthopedic Surgery/Sports Medicine

key_insights.insight: Having a regular, predictable menstrual cycle is a sign of overall health, and irregularities should be investigated.
key_insights.quote: Your body's meant to work like clockwork when it comes to your hormones and your menstrual cycle.

key_insights.insight: PCOS isn't just an ovarian issue, it's a metabolic condition that can increase the risk of serious health problems later in life.
key_insights.quote: PCOS is a symptom. There's nothing wrong with my ovaries. They're just responding to this high insulin level I was born with.

key_insights.insight: Chronic inflammation and insulin resistance are key factors negatively affecting egg quality and ovarian function as women age.
key_insights.quote: Chronic inflammation and insulin resistance are the two things that are going to most dramatically harm your egg's metabolic function.

key_insights.insight: Traditional medicine has often dismissed women's pain, contributing to delays in diagnosis and treatment for conditions like endometriosis.
key_insights.quote: I realized this was systemic bias built into the system where women...we call that a whiny woman around here.

key_insights.insight: Current norms for iron levels in women may be too low, impacting energy and overall well-being.
key_insights.quote: In our clinic, we are looking for 60 to 100 for a ferretin level to be considered optimal, very different than, you know, the baseline for, you know, keeping you out of a hospital versus you functioning at your absolute best.

key_insights.insight: Cold water exposure can dampen inflammation and improve symptomology in women with endometriosis.
key_insights.quote: If we're thinking about the responses to cold exposure... It creates a cascade of immune responses that kind of protects the body.

key_insights.insight: Birth control pills suppress the brain's hormone signals and impact natural hormone production, which needs to be considered for long-term health.
key_insights.quote: The birth control pill shuts off the brain's desire to send the signal to the ovary to make hormones.

key_insights.insight: A low-dose estrogen in the luteal phase can alleviate PMDD symptoms without interfering with ovulation.
key_insights.quote: A low-dose estrogen in the ludial phase can be very effective in targeting...helping alleviate these symptoms without interfering with ovulatory function.

key_insights.insight: Wearable device algorithms are not always designed to capture women's physiology accurately, especially during the luteal phase.
key_insights.quote: Wearables are not designed to capture women's physiology...on the wearables, most women...will never look recovered.

actionable_advice.advice: If you have PCOS, focus on gut health by eating a plant-forward diet rich in fiber to manage insulin resistance and inflammation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Prioritize whole foods, fruits, vegetables, and healthy fats while minimizing ultra-processed foods. Also focus on getting adequate sleep and decreasing chronic stress.

actionable_advice.advice: Implement cold water exposure (around 40 degrees Fahrenheit) for 10 minutes daily for 10-14 days before your period to dampen inflammation in endometriosis.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a cold shower or a cold tub to achieve cold submersion. Avoid ice baths, as they may cause a stress response.

actionable_advice.advice: When using a birth control pill, consider taking it so that you have the seven days of not taking a pill, let your brain have a momentof release from the suppression, and then take it again, to give your brain a break from constant hormone suppression.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consult with your doctor to determine if this is an appropriate approach for your individual health needs and contraceptive goals.

actionable_advice.advice: To improve sperm quality, men should avoid cannabis, cigarettes, and excessive alcohol consumption, as well as heat exposure to the testicles.
actionable_advice.how_to: Limit hot tub and sauna use, avoid prolonged cycling, opt for boxers over briefs, and maintain a healthy diet.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize weight lifting and strength training to build and maintain muscle mass to combat bone density loss that is crucial.
actionable_advice.how_to: Strength train because muscle is a massive metabolic help as well as bone right.

memorable_stories: Story about a physician's first gynecology patient being labeled as a 'whiny woman' by a male supervisor.
The personal account of Liv and her 17-year struggle to get diagnosed with stage 4 endometriosis and the eventual successful surgery made possible by private care.
Account of Ronda Rousey, UFC fighter, going through a 7th failed IVF cycle.
The expert's personal experience with using a picture with herself breastfeeding whilst she launched a new company. Her husband didn't give her grace.
contrarian_claims: The experts challenge the notion that IVF and egg freezing are inherently unnatural or bad, asserting that scientific advancements can improve life and should be embraced.
They challenge that 'natural' family planning is a reliable from of contraceptive.
The experts disagree that a normal level of Iron in medicine means non-pathological. Medicine, it just means common
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Women's Fertility & Lifestyle Debate: Dangers Of Not Having A Period! Fasting Can Backfire For Women
